title: asplenium lanceolatum var. paucilobatum
intro: Asplenium lanceolatum var. paucilobatum, also known as the few-leaved spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves and stems, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Asplenium lanceolatum var. paucilobatum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Asplenium lanceolatum var. paucilobatum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and topical creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
